pages.text:
- DEPARTMENT OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

974/4/7

The Minister of Foreign Affairs

Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the French Republic

Paris

France

)

OFFICE OF THE PRIME MINISTER

HONIARA

SOLOMON ISLANDS

21 August 1981

30

Dear Sir, : have the honour to forward for your attention in your capacit a depositary the Notice of Non-Succession by the Government of Solomo

Islands.

The Convention relating to International Exhibitions which was opened for signature at Paris on the 22nd day of November, one thousand nine hundred and twenty eight and which Convention was amended by a Protocol opened for signature at Paris on the 10th day of May, one thousand nine hundred and forty eight and a further Protocol opened for signature at

Paris on the 10th day of November, one thousand nine hundred and sixty six.

With all good wishes.

Yours sincerely,

(A.N. Storey)

for: Secretary for Foreign Affairs

cc:

Secretary Ceneral

Tinitod Nations " British High Commissioner, Honiara (For Treaty Section, F.C.O.)
